testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.security.MalformedCommandTest

testcase.name: extra unknown fields in payload do not cause crash()
empty JSON object returns failed response()
completely invalid JSON returns failed response()
unknown command type with valid envelope returns failed response()
extremely long command type string does not cause crash()
missing command_id still returns a response()

testsuite.system-out: 09:46:27.908 [Test worker @coroutine#475] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.platform.pubsub.CommandDispatcher -- Dropping command for wrong agent: 5578da2d-60ba-47c5-ab9e-f95bd6e1546f (ours: 9f9a4d01-e3be-4546-9e45-f061b93368f3)
